# ops-status-reviewed

## Class

external

## Purpose

Provide reviewed external status notifications to a known trusted destination.

## Allowed Use

- low-sensitivity operational status updates;
- known destination only;
- no personal or confidential payload without approval.

## Approval Boundary

Ask before sending personal or confidential data, or if the destination or operational impact is unclear.

## Rejection Cases

Reject use if the destination is hidden, the payload is unclear, or the notification implies approval that did not happen.
